name: rust_k8s_webserver-dev
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; cargo --version || true; if ! command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y curl; fi; if [ ! -x /home/vscode/.opencode/bin/opencode ]; then curl -fsSL https://opencode.ai/install | bash; fi; /home/vscode/.opencode/bin/opencode --help >/dev/null || true'
